title: Diamond Grinding Burr Bit Set for Dremel Rotary Tool, 20Pcs Diamond Burr Bits with 1/8 Inch Shank Rotary Tool Accessories for Stone Glass Ceramics Carving, Grinding, Polishing, Engraving
features: 【Multifunctional Applications】Diamond grinding burrs for easy polishing and engraving, precision sanding, grinding glass, metal, hardwood, marble, granite, stone, ceramics, gemstones, agate and more. It is very suitable for shaping the dead wood area of bonsai trees, fine trimming and carving of hard agate stones, etc.

【60 Grit Diamond】60 grit grinding head is rougher and faster than small grain burrs when grinding, polishing, carving, engraving, with even sanding, high hardness, and will not fall off easily. High-speed grinding can be performed with a diamond bit, and then the surface can be quickly polished and smooth.

【More Choices, More Uses】The stone grinding tool includes 10 different grinding bits, each with two of the same grit size and form. The various shapes, including spheres, cones, cylinders, round head cylinders, bullets, and more, meet all your requirements. Ideal for home repair, crafts, DIY engraving hobbies, and more.

【Universal Compatibility】The 1/8" shank diamond burr bits fit most rotary tools, electric drills, cordless drills, die grinders. The grinding head is easy change durable and wear-resistant, ensuring high compatibility and adaptability.

【Quality Assurance】20pcs diamond burr set comes neatly arranged in a delicate case, allows you to carry and store easily. Buy with confidence, and if any issues with quality, leave us a message and we will provide a 100% satisfactory solution soon or full refund. Thank you for your support!
description: Product Description FOTYBEI is a company that manufactures carving, engraving and grinding tools. Including diamond grinding burrs, tungsten carbide burrs, rotary tool wood carving bits and more. We are pleased to offer high quality products and good service to our customers. 60 Grit Diamond Grain 60 grit diamond burrs with a rough surface and is faster than larger grit when grinding, polishing and engraving. High hardness and long life. Excellent abrasion resistance. 1/4" Grinding Head Size Fine engraving and polishing Smooth surface after grinding 1/8" Carbide Steel Shank Carbide steel shank, durable and strong. The 1/8" (3mm) shank compatible with most rotary tools, electric drills, cordless drills, die grinders tools. With the diamond burr bits, you can create a variety of shapes and patterns, ideal for DIY engraving, carving work. Choose a tapered diamond grinding head to grind your small items. It provides excellent results on curved, flat and grooved surfaces. It can be used for polishing and derusting metals and reduces the surface roughness of the product, making the surface bright and even. Diamond grinding burr bits are available in a variety of shapes, including spheres, cones, cylinders and round-headed cylinders. Different shapes to meet your different requirements. Diamond burrs are suitable for DIY engraving, carving and polishing stone, metal, jade, ceramics, DIY crafts, craft modelling and are great for polishing, grinding and sanding. Can be used on stone, glass, metal, tiles, ceramics, marble, granite, jade and other hard materials. Notes: Eye protection must be well performed. Please add sufficient water during use. The shaft must be firmly installed and the speed should not be too high, please set the electric grinder to 20000 RPM under High speed will cause the rod to break.
